message:
style: clippy hygiene pass across core/mesh/crypto/sdk/conformance + live_verification

Purely non-behavioral clippy and rustfmt cleanup:

- crates/fcp-conformance/benches/cutover_harness.rs: promote a helper
  fn to const fn (clippy::missing_const_for_fn)
- crates/fcp-core/src/capability.rs: rename shadowed binding
  (verified → result) to silence let_and_return / shadowing warnings;
  adjust one downstream .clone() call site accordingly
- crates/fcp-core/src/connector.rs, connector_state.rs: wrap rustdoc
  identifier references in backticks (simulate(), lease_seq) so
  cargo doc renders them as inline code and rustdoc::broken_intra_doc_links
  stays quiet
- crates/fcp-crypto/src/frost.rs: drop two needless .clone() calls on
  already-owned values
- crates/fcp-mesh/src/planner.rs: inline format! args ({}, chosen →
  {chosen}) per uninlined_format_args lint
- crates/fcp-mesh/tests/multi_node_harness.rs: replace
  loop { match try_recv() {..} } with while let Ok(..) = try_recv();
  promote helper fn → const fn; add explicit
  #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]/etc. on long test helpers; add
  missing GossipMessage::RevocationPush match arm so the match stays
  exhaustive after recent GossipMessage additions
- crates/fcp-sdk/src/sigv4.rs: add numeric separators (604800 →
  604_800) and rename shadowed `signed` → `sign_result` for clarity
- connectors/{anthropic,gmail,openai,stripe,telegram}/tests/
  live_verification.rs: replace .map_or(false, |x| x == y) idiom with
  == Some(y) per clippy::unnecessary_map_or

Zero behavioral change; all fixes are lint-driven or cosmetic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
